ab: i tatihiay no loma’ ako ko pitilidan, saka rakat sanay kako a talapitilidan, rakat sanay kako a minokay to romi’ami’ad.
ch: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
en: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

ab: cowa katata’ang ko pitilidan niyam, cowa ka’aloman ko mitiliday, sahto o kananaman to.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

ab: cowa kata’angay ko pitilidan niyam, cowa ka’aloman ko mitiliday, sahto o kananaman to.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

ab: mapolong ko kaemangay a masa’opo i kasa’opoan a malacecay ko pisalama kalalicay.
ch: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
en: The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

ab: mikihatiyaay ko singsi i tamiyanan a misalama, o ta’angyay to a laloma’an ko pitilidan.
ch: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
en: We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

ab: miasikay to kami to romi’ami’ad, songila’en ita a miasik ko pitilidan.
ch: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
en: Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

ab: misifin ko roma to sasingaran, miasik ko roma to paenan.
ch: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
en: We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.

ab: mafana’ aca kami a miasik to tadimocomocok no pitilidan, mala’esal kita to tatayalen nga’ , makapah ko pitilidan to romi’ami’ad.
ch: 我們還會打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很乾淨。
